entry.title: Error "An exception was raised" in creating Bank Account in Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We've been creating a Bank Account but there's an error that keeps on showing. Bank, Housebank, Hierarchy and the Connectivity already done but when It comes to creating a Bank Account. It won't proceed.

Error shows "An exception was raised" when saving the Bank Account.

Appreciate your feedback on this. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error F5605 in trx F-28
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting Error F5605 (Specify account for the difference posting) for company code B but not in company code A.

I checked the following path and it is empty for both Company Codes. No reason codes created:

Financial Accounting (New)–> Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable–> Business Transactions–> Incoming Payments Incoming Payments Global Settings–> Overpayment/Underpayment–> Define Reason Codes (transaction OBBE).

I also checked trx FBKP (Automatic posting > Cash discount and payment differences > Payment differences by reason (ZDI)) and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is completed. This is at chat of accounts level.

I also checked trx OBXI for Cash discount expenses and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is complete. This is at chat of accounts level.

Thanks in advance for any help!!!

F

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) lookup on calculated dimension based on dimension property id
entry.content:
Hi All,

Since CONCAT is not yet available in data action advanced formula. We have created a calculated dimension based on dimension "store" & "year_month". 

Based on this calculated dimension, we need to perform a lookup from another dimension in the same model, to get the store status (store status like New, renovation, closed, etc)

Hence, In SAC Dashboard (optimised story with GL accounts) , for a calculated dimension, is there a way to perform a lookup based on another dimension property attribute within the same model ?

@N1kh1l @analytics SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning @SarauShen  if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this requirement

entry.title: Special stock returns
entry.content:
Hello All,

I use configured material.

I do not want my return order type material to be valued at the standard price.

Also, can the return of the sold product be withdrawn from the sold order?

Since the material is tracked in special stock, if this process can be done, what is the calculating cost?

I am waiting for your help

entry.title: how transaction key KBS trigger in MIRO
entry.content:
Dear All,

There is one purchase order with account assignment for a internal order.

i am wondering how transaction key KBS trigger in MIRO. here is transaction

Goods Receipt:

GR QTY= 25,416.65GR Value=  45,922,805Unit Price= 1,882.72Exchange Rate:1,806.80

Invoice Receipt:

 IR QTY= 15,250.00IR Value= 28,212,500Exchange Rate:1,850.00

i did manual calculation, FX Gain/Loss should be

 

IR QTY * GR FX Rate = 15,250.00 * 1,806.80=28,711,482

28,711,482 - 28,212,500 <IR Value> =  498,981 

systen created additional entry for KBS with amount: 434,167 from FX gain/loss

System created entries:

Cr. AP........................................ 27,507,187 (KBS)

Dr. GR/IR Clearing...................... 28,711,482 (WRX)

Cr. FX Rate Gail/Loss................. 64,814 (KDM)

Cr. G/L Account Expense...........  434,167 (KBS)

Cr. Withholding Tax...................  705,313 (WIT)

Please kindly help to explain.

thanks,

RG

entry.title: Year-end closing for non-leading ledger in New GL
entry.content:
Hi, 

Can someone please explain the process of carry forward customer/vendor (F.07) for non-leading ledger only in ECC6.0

The Fiscal year for non-leading ledger is from Jan to Dec and FY for leading ledger is April to March. Understand that FAGLGVTR should be executed to perform the balance carryforward of G/L Balance, but my question is how to perform the balance carry forward process for vendor/customer (F.07) for non-leading ledger in Dec to get the report correctly for Local reporting since this process is not ledger specific. 

Once the next fiscal year (say 2025) is opened for non-leading ledger, will the values of leading ledger automatically reflect in non-leading or how...?

Best regards,
Balam

entry.title: Full Tax Amount (100%) Transfer To Tax Account
entry.content:
Hi All 

Is there a way to transfer full tax amount (100%) tax account? For Example-My invoice is of 100 USD.

Vendor-100 USD

Acc ABC-75 USD (Tax 100%)

Acc CDE-25 USD (Tax 20%)

After posting we want to see it like below-

Vendor-100 USD

Tax Acc ABC-75 USD

Acc CDE-21 USD

Tax Acc-4 USD

At present 20% tax code is working fine however 100% tax code is not transferring full amount to tax acc rather than it is only doing 50%. This is input tax & I tried playing with NVV too along with input tax but still no success.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: NewGL migration reports in debug-mode
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to run reports of the new GL migration cockpit, such as reports for data transfer into FAGLFLEXT or ledger comparison after migrating in debug mode e.g. in order to understand a possible reason for missing data?

Thanks and regards,
Wolfgang

entry.title: TIME_OUT Error in FBL3N and FAGLL03 Transactions After Upgrade to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are encountering a recurring TIME_OUT error when executing the transactions FBL3N and FAGLL03 after upgrading our SAP system from ECC6 to S/4HANA. These transaction (FBL3N) worked correctly in our previous ECC6 environment, but they fail to execute in S/4HANA.

Details of the Issue:

  1. Transaction Name: FBL3N / FAGLL03
  2. System Version:
    • Previous: SAP ECC 6.0
    • Current: SAP S/4HANA
  3. Selection Criteria Used:
    • Date range: [e.g., 01.01.2023 to 31.12.2023]
    • Accounts: [e.g.,3*]
    • Other filters: [e.g., company code 1000].
    • Line items selection :
    • Status : All Line Items
  4. Error Details:
    • Error: TIME_OUT
    • Program: [e.g., SAPLFBL3 or SAPMF05L].

Best regards

entry.title: Solução para a Lei 14.871/2024 - Quotas diferenciadas de depreciação acelerada - Ativo Imobilizado
entry.content: Boa tarde, Espero que todos estejam bem. Por favor, alguém já implantou alguma solução para a Lei que  autoriza a utilização de cotas diferenciadas de depreciação acelerada para máquinas, equipamentos, aparelhos e instrumentos novos destinados ao ativo imobilizado e usados ​​em determinadas atividades econômicas no Ativo Imobilizado? Se a resposta for afirmativa, e posso compartilhar comigo, eu agradeço. Muito obrigado.

entry.title: In Correct GL Balances when carry forward from FY2022 to 2023 using FAGLGVTR
entry.content:
Hi - Have an issue when executing TCode FS10N  for a single G/L Account 33000X( Retained earning account). When drilling down into the Cumulative Balance column, the Line Item Display balance becomes different/larger??

Note these balances carryforward from FY2022 to 2023 using tcode FAGLGVTR.

 

Any ideas.???

Thanks in advance.

Sha

entry.title: Depreciation - Shift Wise Factor issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

Till now we were posting Depreciation - Shift Wise for Assets as unplanned but now we want to post the same system only. As per the requirement we are maintaining the Shift factor and Variable Depreciation portion in the required Asset Master - AS02 , but we are facing the following issues. We have ECC 6 and we are having V3 Fiscal Year Variant.

 

 

 

 

 

Requesting you all to please help me out as this is urgent.

With Regards,

Deepak Hamirani 

SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP Financial Information Management SAP Community

entry.title: Depreciation Shift Wise Factor - Error
entry.content:
Hi All,

For calculating Depreciation Shift Wise in some of the assets currently we are manually posting through Unplanned Depreciation.

But we want from SAP only it should calculate for which we are maintaining Shift Factor as per the requirement i,e 1, 1.5 and 2 along with Variable Depreciation Portion in Asset Master in change mode for which we are receiving error. Request to please help us out. FYI we have V3 Fiscal Year Variant.

 

 

 

 

All the configuration has been check and proper . For some of the Assets no issue. Asset Transfer Date 30.09.2017

SAP Community FIN (Finance) FIN Asset Accounting

entry.title: When Post Goods Issue skip COGS split items with condition
entry.content:
Hello,

I have to deactivate the COGS split if the item has a condition = 'X'  when we Post Goods Issue, but I cannot find where I can do it, if it's a customizing matter or I have to do some BADI or Enhancement...

Do you know somehow?

entry.title: External Loans Given - Setup Errors
entry.content: Hello experts - Our Treasury team has set up external loans given (33A) in the SAP ECC Treasury module.  One is a 4-year USD contract with repayment type of annuity with set monthly payments (interest based on prior months principal balance/remainder applied to principal).  They could create the contract on QA but were not able to see the split between interest and principal, so they attempted to post the initial disbursement and received this error.   Do you know what config we are missing?

entry.title: OBXL setting- payment small differences are posted with Tax line/tax code
entry.content:
Dear team, we are facing a challenge in posting the small customer payment differences to specified GL account maintained in tcode OBXL. The issue is when we post customer payment(F-28) the small difference which is under tolerance getting posted by tax code hence posting is generating separate tax line for small difference. 

The same testing I have performed in client. But in this client the customer payment posting is not calculating tax and hence not generating separate tax line.

The requirement is that we do not want to calculate tax on small differences amount and if possible, want to use default tax code for small differences.

I have also checked the GL setting under control data (FS00) for both clients. The setting is same, and the used tax code is tax applicable

entry.title: Compatibility Packs for Simple Finance
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are running S4HANA 2021, and everything is on premise. I understand that we need certain Compatibility Packs, so that the New Statutory Reports are and Cloud Applications are available to us as opposed to the old ones we are using. 

Is there a step-by-step documentation on how to achieve this?

Thanks

entry.title: How increase the length of bank account number for Indian client.
entry.content: Business requirement is like that they want increase length of Bank account no. when I'm check in the system  OY17 transaction there I saw bank account no length is 15 but at the time of enter the account no in BP system take 18 digit no length. so how to increase bank account no length in sap.

entry.content:
How to configure EPIC – Payment Management and Bank-Enterprise Integration?

entry.title: Alternative for Advanced Financial Closing
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a non-BTP alternative of Advanced Financial Cockpit? I noticed that Advanced Financial cockpit incurs a very high cost, and as per the below note, since the mentioned Business Functions are active for us, it looks like the only solution, and classical Closing Cockpit cannot be used. However, Our usage is not so much so as to benefit from so high a cost.

2547 - S4TWL - Closing Cockpit with S/4HANA OP 

Thanks in advance.
